About Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP

Match preview

Coritiba SAF - PR host Palmeiras - SP in the Brazilian Serie A on Wednesday, 22 July 2026 at 22:30. The match is scheduled at Estádio Couto Pereira, Curitiba. Follow the live score, real-time commentary, confirmed lineups and match stats on this page as soon as kick-off begins.

Current league position

Coritiba SAF - PR sit 7th in the Brazilian Serie A table with 26 points from 18 matches (7W · 5D · 6L). Palmeiras - SP are 1st with 41 points from 18 matches (12W · 5D · 1L).

The full standings table — including form, goal difference and points gap — is available in the Standings tab above, and the complete season archive lives on the Brazilian Serie A hub.

Head-to-head history

These two clubs have met 30 times on record. Coritiba SAF - PR have won 12, Palmeiras - SP have won 12 and 6 matches ended level. A full timeline of previous meetings — scores, dates and competitions — is in the H2H tab above.

How to follow the match

SportScore will publish a live matchcast the moment Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP kicks off. You'll see the clock, running score, goals, yellow and red cards, substitutions and live team stats (possession, shots, corners, fouls) without refreshing the page.

Advanced match statistics

Alongside the headline score, SportScore tracks the live metrics that actually decide football matches:

  • Ball possession (%)
  • Shots on target & shots off target
  • Corner kicks
  • Fouls, offsides, yellow and red cards
  • Dangerous attacks & attacks
  • Starting XI, formation and confirmed substitutes

Match chat

Join the live Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP chatroom in the sidebar to react with other fans as the match unfolds. The chat is free, no account required.

Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP — frequently asked

When is Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP played?

Kick-off is Wednesday, 22 July 2026 at 22:30 UTC in the Brazilian Serie A.

Where is Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP played?

At Estádio Couto Pereira in Curitiba, Brazil (capacity 40502).

Has Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP started?

Not yet. The match kicks off Wednesday, 22 July 2026 at 22:30 UTC. SportScore will start streaming live scores, events and stats on this page as soon as the first whistle blows.

How can I follow Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP live?

On this page. SportScore publishes the live scoreboard, goal & card events, possession and shots, team-stat bars and line-ups free of charge and with no sign-up. Refresh is automatic while the match is in play.

Which competition is Coritiba SAF - PR vs Palmeiras - SP part of?

The Brazilian Serie A in Brazil. Full fixtures, standings and top scorers for this season are on the competition hub.
